dynamic_foveation.charged_byte_policy: If shipped, these centers or their generator parameters must be charged inside archive.zip. As planner input they are empirical only.

interpretation.pose_dim1_to_5: non-velocity PoseNet/control dimensions; useful as allocation signals before any charged residual codec is promoted
interpretation.products: low-order curvature/pitch interactions, not pixel warps
interpretation.velocity: dominant longitudinal scalar axis used by QP1

ego_motion_basis.radial_zoom_guard: This plan deliberately emits control-field atoms only. It does not authorize radial zoom or image warp runtime changes; tiny geometry errors must be exact-evaluated before promotion.

formulas.atom_strength_proxy: robust absolute z-score of pose/derivative/interaction basis

non_promotable_warning: Planning only. Use this to weight allocation, foveation, or learned decoder hypotheses; no score/rank/promotion claim is valid until a closed archive charges every bit and passes exact CUDA auth eval.
